preferredDeck: YouTube now gets out of the way as soon as sign-in succeeds while your first subscription sync continues quietly
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Hide the YouTube login window immediately after authentication while the first subscription sync continues in the background.
Keep later YouTube syncs and Freed Offline playlist actions inside the persistent hidden session.
editorialNotes: Keep the internal Automerge worker memory harness out of user-facing notes.
